name: ML-DSA.Sign_internal
label: Algorithm 7
body_raw: (𝜌, 𝐾, 𝑡𝑟, 𝐬1, 𝐬2, 𝐭0) ← skDecode(𝑠𝑘)
𝐀 ← ExpandA(𝜌) ▷ 𝐀 is generated and stored in NTT representation as 𝐀
𝜇 ← H(BytesToBits(𝑡𝑟)||𝑀 ′, 64) ▷ message representative that may optionally be computed in a different cryptographic module
𝜌″ ← H(𝐾||𝑟𝑛𝑑||𝜇, 64) ▷ compute private random seed
while (𝐳, 𝐡) = ⊥ do ▷ rejection sampling loop
𝐲 ∈ 𝑅 𝑞 ℓ ← ExpandMask(𝜌″, 𝜅)
▷ HighBits is applied componentwise (see explanatory text in Section 7.4)
𝑐 ∈ 𝑅 𝑞 ← SampleInBall(𝑐)̃ ▷ verifier’s challenge
▷ LowBits is applied componentwise (see explanatory text in Section 7.4)
if ||𝐳||∞ ≥ 𝛾1 − 𝛽 or ||𝐫0||∞ ≥ 𝛾2 − 𝛽 then (z, h) ← ⊥ ▷ validity checks
▷ MakeHint is applied componentwise (see explanatory text in Section 7.4)
if ||⟨⟨𝑐𝐭0⟩⟩||∞ ≥ 𝛾2 or the number of 1’s in 𝐡 is greater than 𝜔, then (z, h) ← ⊥
